description: A vertical graphic on a dark navy background. The top shows line-art icons of a laptop with a check mark and a hand holding an identification card, alongside a stylized 2025 with the curved label END-OF-YEAR REVIEW. Below, white, light-blue and gold text reads DHS is preserving public benefits for Americans. Over 206 million eligibility checks were conducted in 2025 for federal agencies overseeing public benefits. The DHS seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the bottom left.
notable_text: END-OF-YEAR REVIEW; 2025; DHS is preserving public benefits for Americans. Over 206 million eligibility checks were conducted in 2025 for federal agencies overseeing public benefits
